sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Village Farms Pilots Potency Range Labelling in Canada
feed.summary: Village Farms International, Inc.'s Canadian cannabis brand, Pure Sunfarms, is piloting potency range labelling on Pink Kush cannabis flower packaging in British Columbia. This move aims to provide consumers with a more accurate and transparent understanding of cannabis quality by reflecting natural biological variations, rather than a single THC percentage. The initiative builds on the company's research into THC variability and seeks to elevate industry standards for consumer trust and transparency.

feed.title: 58,649 RSUs granted to Granite Point (GPMT) CFO under incentive plan
feed.summary: Granite Point Mortgage Trust Inc. (GPMT) Chief Financial Officer Blake Johnson was granted 58,649 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on March 5, 2026, under the company's 2022 Omnibus Incentive Plan. These RSUs represent contingent rights to receive common stock on a 1-to-1 basis and will vest over three years: 33% in March 2027, 33% in March 2028, and 34% in March 2029. This award is a compensation-related equity grant, not an open-market transaction.

feed.title: Charles River Advances Cardiovascular Health Awareness Through Support of the American Heart Association
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. has partnered with the American Heart Association to support initiatives focused on cardiovascular disease awareness, prevention, and community health. This collaboration, which includes backing the Heart of Boston campaign, aims to address the persistent threat of heart disease, which remains the leading cause of death in the U.S. The effort reinforces Charles River's commitment to science-driven progress and community engagement, aligning with its corporate purpose to create healthier lives.

feed.title: Clorox Announces April 30 Webcast of Third-Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Results
feed.summary: The Clorox Company will issue its third-quarter fiscal year 2026 results on April 30, 2026. The company will post a press release and prepared management remarks on its website at 1:15 p.m. PT / 4:15 p.m. ET, followed by a live Q&A audio webcast for analysts with Chair and CEO Linda Rendle and Chief Financial Officer Luc Bellet at 2 p.m. PT / 5 p.m. ET.

feed.title: Clorox Announces April 30 Webcast of Third-Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Results
feed.summary: Clorox (NYSE: CLX) will report its third-quarter fiscal year 2026 results on April 30, 2026. A press release and prepared management remarks will be posted at 1:15 p.m. PT / 4:15 p.m. ET, followed by a live Q&A audio webcast at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET featuring Chair and CEO Linda Rendle and CFO Luc Bellet. Links to these materials will be available on the company's quarterly results page.

feed.title: Mettler-Toledo posts Q1 results May 7, holds call next morning
feed.summary: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (NYSE: MTD) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after the market close on Thursday, May 7, 2026. The company will host a conference call the following morning, May 8, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss these results. Investors can access the live audio webcast of the call on the Investor section of the company’s website.

feed.title: WD-40’s (NASDAQ:WDFC) Q1 CY2026 Sales Top Estimates
feed.summary: WD-40 (NASDAQ:WDFC) reported Q1 CY2026 results, with sales of $161.7 million, beating Wall Street's revenue expectations. While the company's Q1 performance exceeded estimates, its full-year revenue guidance was slightly below analysts' projections, and full-year EPS guidance fell short. The stock remained flat immediately after the announcement.

feed.title: Why one THC number is disappearing from some cannabis packs in B.C.
feed.summary: Village Farms International (NASDAQ: VFF) has announced that its Canadian cannabis brand, Pure Sunfarms, is piloting THC potency range labelling on Pink Kush dried flower in British Columbia. This initiative, the first commercial use of range-based THC on cannabis flower in Canada, aims to reflect the natural variability of the agricultural product and increase transparency for consumers. The change moves away from a single THC percentage to a range, acknowledging that other factors like aroma and terpene profile also contribute significantly to the consumer experience.

feed.title: Live Nation antitrust trial nears end as lawyer for 34 states labels the concerts giant a monopolist
feed.summary: The antitrust trial against Live Nation Entertainment is concluding, with a lawyer for 34 states arguing that the company and Ticketmaster monopolize the concert industry and inflate prices. Live Nation's lawyer countered, stating the company operates fairly in a competitive market and that success is not illegal. Jurors are expected to begin deliberations after closing arguments.

feed.title: Live Nation antitrust trial nears end as lawyer for 34 states labels the concerts giant a monopolist
feed.summary: The antitrust trial against Live Nation Entertainment is nearing its end, with a lawyer for 34 states arguing that the company and its Ticketmaster arm are monopolizing the concert industry and increasing prices. Live Nation's lawyer countered that competitive practices are fair and the company's success is not illegal. The jury is expected to begin deliberations after closing arguments concluded.

feed.title: American, Southwest raise bag fees amid escalating fuel prices
feed.summary: American Airlines and Southwest Airlines have increased their bag fees, citing rising fuel costs and the "evolving global backdrop." This comes amidst other airline news at Philadelphia International Airport, including new and relaunched routes and the introduction of free Wi-Fi on some flights.

feed.title: Air Products and Chemicals (NYSE:APD) Given New $307.00 Price Target at UBS Group
feed.summary: UBS Group has raised its price target for Air Products and Chemicals (NYSE:APD) to $307.00 from $285.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating. This adjustment comes after Air Products exceeded Q1 earnings and revenue estimates and issued optimistic FY2026 guidance. The stock is currently trading near its 52-week high, with other analysts also providing diverse ratings and price targets.

feed.title: UBS Group Issues Positive Forecast for Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) Stock Price
feed.summary: UBS Group has raised its price target for Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) stock from $220 to $230, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential 33.55% upside. This comes despite Albemarle missing EPS expectations in its latest quarter but exceeding revenue forecasts with $1.43 billion. The specialty chemicals company currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts, with an average target price of $171.24.

feed.title: WD-40 (NASDAQ:WDFC) Issues Quarterly Earnings Results
feed.summary: WD-40 (NASDAQ:WDFC) announced strong quarterly earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with an EPS of $1.50 and revenue of $161.67 million. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $1.02 per share, and institutional ownership remains high. Analysts currently rate the stock a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $300.00.

feed.title: Voya Financial (NYSE:VOYA) Price Target Lowered to $87.00 at UBS Group
feed.summary: UBS Group has lowered its price target for Voya Financial (NYSE:VOYA) to $87.00 from $90.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating, implying a potential 25% upside. This adjustment comes after Voya Financial missed its quarterly EPS estimates, reporting $1.94 against an expected $2.11, despite a 5% revenue increase to $2.01 billion. Several other major brokerages have also recently trimmed their price targets for the asset manager.

feed.title: Dollar Tree (NASDAQ:DLTR) Issues Q1 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Dollar Tree (NASDAQ:DLTR) announced its Q1 2026 earnings guidance, projecting EPS between $1.45 and $1.60 and revenue of $4.9B–$5.0B. The company also raised its full-year 2026 EPS guidance to $6.50–$6.90. Despite beating Q4 2025 EPS estimates with $2.56, shares fell by $3.02 to $102.60 following the update, and analysts currently hold a "Hold" consensus rating with an average price target of $123.24.

feed.title: The Travelers Companies, Inc. stock: What you should know now
feed.summary: The Travelers Companies, Inc. (TRV) stock is attracting investor attention due to its resilience, consistent shareholder returns, and strong financial performance in the property and casualty insurance sector. Analysts maintain varied ratings from 'Hold' to 'Outperform' with a consensus price target around $309, indicating a balanced view on its valuation. The company's strategic financial management, including a recent $5 billion share repurchase program, robust underwriting discipline, and diverse segment operations, position it as a stable investment for long-term growth despite potential risks like catastrophic events and regulatory changes.

feed.title: Equinix Insider Sold Shares Worth $432,480, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: An insider at Equinix recently sold shares totaling $432,480, as detailed in a new SEC filing. This transaction occurred on April 9, 2026, and is part of the general financial news concerning the company. Equinix provides data center hosting and interconnection services globally.

feed.title: UBS Group Lowers BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) Price Target to $1,235.00
feed.summary: UBS Group has lowered its price target for BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) to $1,235.00 from $1,280.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of approximately 23%. BlackRock recently surpassed earnings expectations with $13.16 EPS and $7.01 billion in revenue, driven by a 23.4% year-over-year revenue increase. However, the company faces near-term risks including substantial insider selling, analyst target trims, a significant crypto portfolio markdown, and an investor-alert probe.

feed.title: UBS Group Lowers Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU) Price Target to $98.00
feed.summary: UBS Group has reduced its price target for Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU) from $105.00 to $98.00 while maintaining a "neutral" rating, indicating a limited upside. This adjustment comes amidst cautious sentiment from other analysts, with a consensus target price of $110.89 and Prudential recently missing quarterly EPS estimates. Despite mixed analyst views, significant insider buying activity, including a substantial acquisition by Insurance Co. of America Prudential, suggests shareholder confidence.

feed.title: Carrier Global Corp Stock (CARR) Closed Up by 5.30% on Apr 9: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Carrier Global Corp (CARR) stock closed up by 5.30% on April 9th, driven by positive analyst sentiment and recent company developments. Key factors include the launch of a new automation platform, growth in its data center cooling business, analyst upgrades, and a share repurchase program. Despite recent earnings misses and softness in the residential HVAC market, strategic initiatives appear to be outweighing these concerns.

feed.title: Applied Materials Inc Stock (AMAT) Closed Up by 3.07% on Apr 9: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: Applied Materials Inc. (AMAT) stock closed up by 3.07% on April 9, driven by a raised price target from Susquehanna to $500, new advanced chipmaking system announcements, and strong financial performance. The company anticipates over 20% growth in its semiconductor equipment business for calendar year 2026, benefiting from rising AI investments and memory demand. Despite a positive outlook, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock might be overvalued, and the company faces risks from U.S. export restrictions and geopolitical tensions.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land plunges after CEO of top shareholder Horizon Kinetics dies (TPL:NYSE)
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land (TPL) stock fell significantly following the sudden death of Murray Stahl, CEO of its major shareholder Horizon Kinetics (HKHC) and a TPL board member. Horizon Kinetics owns approximately 15% of Texas Pacific Land. The news caused TPL shares to drop 15.6% to a two-month low.

feed.title: UDR, Inc. Named a Top Workplace by USA Today for Second Consecutive Year
feed.summary: UDR, Inc. (NYSE: UDR), a leading multifamily REIT, has been recognized as a 2026 Top Workplace by USA Today and Energage for the second consecutive year. CEO Tom Toomey highlighted the company's culture, which empowers and values its 1,400+ associates. This recognition follows significant investments in employee experience, leading to high engagement and retention rates.

feed.title: Dow announces results from 2026 Annual Stockholder Meeting
feed.summary: Dow (NYSE: DOW) announced the results of its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, where all director nominees were re-elected for one-year terms. Stockholders also approved an advisory resolution on executive compensation, a one-year frequency for future advisory votes, an amendment to the 2019 Stock Incentive Plan, and the ratification of Deloitte & Touche LLP as the independent auditor for 2026. Following the meeting, the Board declared a quarterly dividend of 35 cents per share, marking the 459th consecutive dividend paid by the company.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean will discuss first-quarter results on April 30
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) has scheduled a conference call for April 30, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET to discuss its first-quarter 2026 financial results. The call will be webcast live on the company's investor relations website, rclinvestor.com, with a replay available for 30 days. The company, a leading global vacation provider, operates 69 ships and aims to expand its private destinations to eight by 2028.

feed.title: Carrier will detail first-quarter results April 30 in 7:30 a.m. webcast
feed.summary: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR) is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 earnings on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The company will host a live conference call and webcast at 7:30 a.m. ET to discuss the results, with a presentation and news release available on its investor website prior to the call. A recording of the webcast will also be made available later that day.

feed.title: Gallagher will post Q1 results after the close, then host a webcast
feed.summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE: AJG) is set to release its first-quarter 2026 earnings after the market closes on Thursday, April 30, 2026. Chairman and CEO J. Patrick Gallagher, Jr. will host a conference call at 5:15 pm ET on the same day to discuss the results. The earnings report and the live broadcast of the conference call will be available on the company's website, with a replay accessible approximately two hours after the live event.

feed.title: CarMax Announces William Cobb and Jim Kessler to Join the Board
feed.summary: CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX) announced its intention to add William "Bill" Cobb and Jim Kessler to its Board of Directors in connection with the 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. This move follows constructive engagement with Starboard Value LP, which supports the additions to strengthen the Board's experience and drive long-term value creation. William Cobb brings extensive experience from consumer-facing and technology-focused businesses, while Jim Kessler offers over 20 years of leadership in the automotive industry.

feed.title: FS KKR Capital will post Q1 results May 6, then take questions May 7
feed.summary: FS KKR Capital Corp (FSK) will release its first quarter 2026 results after market close on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. An investor presentation will be posted the same day. The company will also host a live webcast conference call on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET for research analysts and interested parties.

feed.title: CarMax Announces William Cobb and Jim Kessler to Join the Board
feed.summary: CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX) plans to add William "Bill" Cobb and Jim Kessler to its Board of Directors in connection with the upcoming 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. The company highlights that these additions will bring valuable auto industry and consumer expertise, strengthening the board and supporting long-term value creation. Starboard Value LP, an investment advisory firm, supports CarMax's decision, emphasizing that these appointments, along with CEO Keith Barr, will drive substantial value creation.

feed.title: Equinix (EQIX) Chief People Officer sells 424 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Equinix Inc.'s Chief People Officer, Brandi Galvin Morandi, sold 424 shares of common stock at $1,020.00 per share on April 8, 2026, under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. After this transaction, she directly holds 9,970.456 shares of Equinix common stock. The sale, valued at $432,480, was an open-market transaction.

feed.title: [ARS] Diamondback Energy, Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an SEC filing (Form ARS) by Diamondback Energy, Inc. (FANG) on April 9, 2026. The filing has a low impact and neutral sentiment. The article also provides recent news and other SEC filings related to Diamondback Energy, Inc., along with key stock data.

feed.title: UBS Lowers Price Target for Prudential Financial (PRU) to $98
feed.summary: UBS has lowered its price target for Prudential Financial (PRU) to $98 from $105, while maintaining a 'Neutral' rating. This adjustment follows several other analyst price target reductions and a downgrade by Wells Fargo. Prudential Financial, a major U.S. life insurer with significant operations in the U.S. and Japan, currently has an average brokerage recommendation of "Hold" from 19 firms.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (WDFC) WD-40 Company Reports Q2 Revenue $161.7M, vs. FactSet Est of $154.4M
feed.summary: WD-40 Company (WDFC) reported Q2 revenue of $161.7 million, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $154.4 million. The company also posted adjusted EPS of $1.50 per share, which was higher than the FactSet estimate of $1.39. For fiscal year 2026, WD-40 expects an EPS range of $5.75-$6.15 and a revenue range of $630M-$655M.

feed.title: WD-40 Co. (WDFC) Misses Q2 EPS by 8c, Beats on Revenue, Reaffirms FY Guidance
feed.summary: WD-40 Co. (WDFC) reported Q2 EPS of $1.32, missing analyst estimates by $0.08, but exceeded revenue expectations with $161.7 million against a consensus of $154.9 million. The company reaffirmed its full-year fiscal 2026 guidance, citing growth initiatives and momentum across its trade blocs.

feed.title: Supermicro Accelerates Deployment Times with New Gold Series Enterprise Server Solutions
feed.summary: Supermicro has launched new Gold Series enterprise server solutions designed to accelerate deployment times for customers. These pre-configured systems, optimized for a range of workloads including AI, compute, storage, and intelligent edge, are ready to ship within three business days, significantly shortening lead times. The Gold Series offers validated, workload-optimized configurations, making industry-leading server technology more quickly accessible to enterprises.

feed.title: TVA CEO Don Moul to retire July 1; Glasgow EPB power supplier faces leadership change
feed.summary: Don Moul, CEO of the Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA), the largest public utility in the U.S. and power supplier for Glasgow EPB, announced his retirement effective July 1. His decision follows public criticism from U.S. President Donald Trump, who also pushed for a significant pay cut for TVA executives, including a $500,000 compensation ceiling. The TVA board, largely appointed by Trump, is expected to quickly name Moul's successor.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics (NASDAQ:STLD) Updates Q1 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics (NASDAQ:STLD) has updated its Q1 2026 earnings per share guidance to $2.730-$2.770, which is below the consensus estimate of $3.220. Despite this, the company increased its quarterly dividend to $0.53 per share, representing an annualized yield of approximately 1.1%. The stock traded up 1.3% midday, reaching $189.97, with analysts maintaining a mixed "Hold" rating and an average price target of $182.44.

feed.title: Board of Vera Therapeutics (VERA) seeks votes on directors, auditor and say-on-pay
feed.summary: Vera Therapeutics (VERA) has scheduled its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders for May 21, 2026, to be held virtually. Stockholders will vote on electing three Class II directors, ratifying KPMG LLP as the independent auditor for 2026, and approving an advisory "say-on-pay" resolution for executive compensation. The board recommends voting in favor of all three proposals.

feed.title: Skin cancer drug data from Verrica wins late-breaker slot in Chicago
feed.summary: Verrica Pharmaceuticals announced the acceptance of a late-breaking abstract for its drug VP-315, an oncolytic peptide for basal cell carcinoma. Phase 2 exploratory data suggest a potential abscopal effect in untreated non-target BCC tumors. This data will be presented at the 2026 Society for Investigative Dermatology Annual Meeting in Chicago, highlighting VP-315 as a potential non-surgical treatment option for skin cancer.

feed.title: Pool Corp will post quarterly results before markets open April 23
feed.summary: Pool Corporation (Nasdaq: POOL) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings results before the market opens on April 23, 2026. The company will also hold a conference call at 10:00 a.m. CT / 11:00 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results. A live webcast and replay of the call will be available on Pool Corp's website.

feed.title: Realty Income to post Q1 results May 6, investor call at 2 p.m. PDT
feed.summary: Realty Income (NYSE: O) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 operating results after the NYSE closes on May 6, 2026. A quarterly investor call will follow at 2:00 p.m. PDT the same day, with a live webcast available on the company's homepage. The company, known for its monthly dividends, reported a portfolio of over 15,500 properties as of December 31, 2025, and 669 consecutive monthly dividends.

feed.title: WSFS Financial posts Q1 results April 23, holds call the next day
feed.summary: WSFS Financial Corporation announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings after the close of business on April 23, 2026. A conference call to discuss these results will be held the following day, April 24, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. ET. Interested parties can register or access the live event via the company's investor relations website, with a replay available afterward.

feed.title: Rick Byrd to Retire from BD
feed.summary: Richard (Rick) Byrd, executive vice president and president of the Interventional Segment at BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company), has announced his intent to retire after nearly 25 years with the company. Byrd held various leadership roles and was instrumental in strengthening BD's portfolio and operational rigor. He will remain in his position until June, and BD plans to announce a successor before his departure.

feed.title: After 25 years at BD, a top medical device executive will retire
feed.summary: Richard (Rick) Byrd, Executive Vice President and President of the Interventional Segment at BD (NYSE: BDX), will retire after nearly 25 years with the company, effective June 2026. During his tenure, Byrd held various leadership roles and significantly contributed to the company's growth, including expanding Vascular Access Management and leading critical manufacturing scale-up during the COVID-19 pandemic. BD plans to name his successor before his retirement date.

feed.title: TriSalus brings liver and uterine treatment data to SIR 2026
feed.summary: TriSalus Life Sciences (TLSI) will present new clinical and preclinical data at the 2026 Society of Interventional Radiology (SIR) Annual Scientific Meeting. The presentations will highlight the capabilities of its Pressure Enabled Drug Delivery (PEDD) platform for applications in liver-directed therapies and uterine artery embolization, demonstrating the platform's versatility in enhancing therapeutic delivery across various disease states. The company's CEO, Mary Szela, and CMO, Richard Marshall, emphasized the growing body of evidence supporting PEDD's potential to improve patient outcomes by enabling more effective delivery of therapies.

feed.title: WD-40 Company Reports Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: WD-40 Company reported a strong second fiscal quarter for 2026, with total net sales increasing by 11% to $161.7 million and maintenance product sales jumping 13%, or 6% in constant currency. The company reaffirmed its fiscal year 2026 guidance, expecting net sales growth of 5-9% and diluted earnings per share between $5.75 and $6.15, driven by momentum in its core maintenance product segments and strategic initiatives. Despite a decrease in reported net income and EPS due to a one-time tax benefit in the prior year, non-GAAP adjusted figures showed a healthy increase.

feed.title: $13M deal gives Transcat its first operational base in Latin America
feed.summary: Transcat, Inc. (Nasdaq: TRNS) has acquired SCM Metrology and Laboratories S.A. for approximately $13 million in cash, marking its first operational expansion into Latin America. This acquisition enhances Transcat's ability to serve multinational customers in highly regulated markets, particularly in medical device and life sciences, by providing a broader local service footprint and creating new distribution sales opportunities in Costa Rica. SCM brings over 20 years of experience and is an ISO/IEC 17025-accredited calibration laboratory, strengthening Transcat's global service capabilities.

feed.title: Wynn Resorts Announces First Quarter Earnings Release Date
feed.summary: Wynn Resorts, Limited (NASDAQ: WYNN) has announced that it will release its first quarter financial results for the period ending March 31, 2026, after the market closes on Thursday, May 7, 2026. This will be followed by a conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT (4:30 p.m. ET) to discuss the results. Interested parties can access the live broadcast via the company's investor relations website.
